summary: The peer reputation divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in reputation outcome returns; no peer ban, unban, or disconnect behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 156: M	crates/net/network-types/src/peers/mod.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to DisconnectAndBan, Ban, and Unban return expressions.
No reputation thresholding, connected-state disconnect, ban transition, unban transition, or None outcome behavior changed.
